content: {"analyses": [{"source_url": "https://www.semanticscholar.org/paper/b7e344783d64901a0d5ee5216eea6812300678f1", "source_title": "The impact of intermittent fasting on lipid profile - an umbrella review.", "source_type": "journal_article", "source_quality": 0.7, "overall_relevance": 0.65, "year": 0, "authors": [], "venue": "", "doi": "", "atomic_facts": [{"statement": "Intermittent fasting (IF), with its various regimens, has gained attention as a potential strategy to improve lipid parameters.", "direct_quote": "Intermittent fasting (IF), with its various regimens, has gained attention as a potential strategy to improve lipid parameters.", "fact_category": "causal_link", "relevance_score": 0.55, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}, {"statement": "This umbrella review evaluates recent evidence from meta-analyses regarding the impact of IF, including time-restricted eating (TRE),...", "direct_quote": "This umbrella review evaluates recent evidence from meta-analyses regarding the impact of IF, including time-restricted eating (TRE), alternate-day fasting (ADF), and Ramadan intermittent fasting (RIF), on lipid profile parameters such as total chole", "fact_category": "causal_link", "relevance_score": 0.55, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}, {"statement": "The inclusion criteria were human studies, IF interventions of any type, and outcomes presenting abovementioned lipid profile parameters.", "direct_quote": "The inclusion criteria were human studies, IF interventions of any type, and outcomes presenting abovementioned lipid profile parameters.", "fact_category": "causal_link", "relevance_score": 0.55, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}], "evidence_summary": "Auto-extracted 3 facts from The impact of intermittent fasting on lipid profile - an umb."}]}
